# Pull Request

## Summary
Describe what you changed and why it belongs in Adamantine Wallet OS.

## Contract Impact
- [ ] No contract-visible behavior change
- [ ] Contract-visible change (version bump + docs updated)

## Determinism & Safety
- [ ] No time/randomness/order dependence introduced
- [ ] No silent fallback paths (fail-closed with explicit reason_id)
- [ ] Input canonicalization preserved / strengthened

## Tests
- [ ] Regression test added for every fix/change
- [ ] Negative / toxic-input tests added or extended
- [ ] CI green

## Notes
Anything reviewers should pay attention to.
